cta.title: Own a tattoo studio?
cta.subtitle: Showcase your portfolio on RuangTato, build your own studio page, and receive potential clients directly via WhatsApp — no middlemen.

pricing.title: Choose a Plan That Fits Your Needs
pricing.subtitle: Transparent, with no hidden fees. Cancel anytime.
pricing.headerDesc: Choose the subscription duration that fits best. No hidden fees, no vendor lock-in.
pricing.footerNote: All prices include VAT. Secure payment via Midtrans.
pricing.faqDescPrefix: Still unclear? Our team is ready to help via email

faq.a: Currently we do not provide a free trial, but all plans can be refunded within the first 7 days if there are technical issues on our end.

faq.q: What is the difference between plans?
faq.a: The Starter plan is great for studios just starting out. Growth and Pro add analytics and trusted badges. Enterprise is for studios with large teams and API needs.
Payments are securely processed via Midtrans. We accept credit/debit cards, bank transfers, e-wallets (GoPay, OVO, DANA), and QRIS.
No. You need to renew manually before the active period ends. We will send a reminder 7 days before the due date.

faq.q: Can I upgrade or downgrade midway?
faq.a: Yes. Upgrades will be active immediately with prorated calculation, while downgrades apply when the next cycle begins.
